title: Doctor has advised zero fibre
body:
They didn't say which type of fibre...

WTF?

Is there some complication in which this might be the best course of action?


Edit: heard this from a family member. The patient is elderly and doesn't speak English so I feel somewhat helpless. The doctor has said meat and carbohydrates are OK.

In trying to understand this my best theory is that the doctors in this country are both very Conservative and also well behind the curve.

I just don't know how to help. I sense in this guy that he either wants to live or learn to die. I sense that he wants help from me.

If I didn't have everything in the way I would say,
Spirulina, chorella and kefir diet

But I really don't feel it's my palace to say anything... Which is horrendous
